baseline.standard: Run before edits when practical or record why unavailable.

database.standard: Supabase schema, enum, RLS, and data access changes need tracked SQL plus Supabase plugin or SQL contract evidence.

deterministicVerify.standard: Harness structure, lint, typecheck, tests, and DB contract checks must pass or be explicitly blocked.

review.standard: Review Agent must report no blockers before work is marked complete.

runtimeEvidence.standard: Browser Use, API, and Supabase evidence must match the changed runtime surface.
